channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Russia introduces bill to criminalize unregistered crypto services
item.description: Individuals and groups would be required to register with the Bank of Russia before offering certain crypto services, or potentially face fines and prison time.

item.title: Sanctioned Russia-Linked Exchange Grinex Suspends Operations Following Alleged Cyberattack
item.description: TL;DR Grinex, the sanctioned successor to the Russian exchange Garantex, suspended operations yesterday following a claimed 1 billion ruble ($13.7… The post Sanctioned Russia-Linked Exchange Grinex Suspends Operations Following Alleged Cyb…

item.title: Polymarket odds of Hormuz Strait traffic normalizing by end of May spike to 73%
item.description: Traders on the Polymarket prediction market platform place the odds of the Strait returning to normal traffic by May 31, 2026, at 73%.

item.title: Bitcoin Cracks 7-Month Ceiling. Can Bulls Push It Higher?
item.description: The price of Bitcoin breaks a seven-month downtrend as geopolitical shifts and prediction markets point to $84K next.

item.title: You Can Now Use XRP on Solana—Here's How
item.description: More than $1.2 million worth of wrapped XRP tokens (wXRP) have been minted on Solana as the Ripple-linked asset gains greater DeFi utility.

item.title: Strategy proposes semi-monthly dividends on its popular STRC preferred stock
item.description: "[The] proposed changes are intended to stabilize price, dampen cyclicality, drive liquidity, and grow demand," said Executive Chairman Michael Saylor.

item.title: Rep. Sheri Biggs Doubles Down on Bitcoin, Buys Up to $250K of BlackRock's ETF
item.description: Rep. Sheri Biggs purchased up to $250,000 worth of BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF last month, padding a position she entered into last July.

item.title: Sam Altman's World Teams With Zoom, Tinder to Better Verify Humans in the AI Age
item.description: Iris-scanning crypto project World expands with Tinder's U.S. human verification rollout and Zoom's Deep Face feature.

item.title: US Senator asks for Binance monitor update amid scrutiny of Iran sanctions
item.description: A letter from US Senator Richard Blumenthal said he was concerned about “mounting allegations of dangerously lax anti-money laundering prevention by Binance.”

item.title: Ether accumulation wallet balances increased by 33%: Is a rally to $3K next?
item.description: A confirmed cup-and-handle breakout on Ether’s chart and a double-digit increase in ETH accumulation wallet balances could be earlier signs of a longer-term rally for the altcoin.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren Accuses SEC Chair Paul Atkins of Potentially Lying to Congress
item.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren said Paul Atkins may have intentionally misled Congress by pushing back over the SEC's dwindling enforcement actions.

item.title: There’s a new documentary claiming crypto is all hype and harm. That tired narrative has been told again and again. But it’s never been accurate. Tens of millions of everyday Americans are already using this tool in practical ways, to diversify their income, run - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFA1ZGhnZjNyXzhrZHVleUxZa0ZwRUZCZEtRQl9IRkRrMGYydjdBNWtvVWpLRmYxZklZUl9wZ1JFVXQ5U0sxNTg2N1hEYVBVSmdIVUlLcG5zRmlsaTlNREZ1YQ?oc=5" target="_blank">There’s a new documentary claiming c…

item.title: Crypto market liquidations hit $820M as Bitcoin price taps $78K
item.description: Nearly a billion dollars in leveraged crypto positions were liquidated in the past 24 hours as the Bitcoin price rallied above $78,000.

item.title: Kraken's parent company to acquire CFTC-regulated exchange Bitnomial
item.description: Payward, the parent company of the Kraken crypto exchange, cited Bitnomial's regulatory licenses as the primary driver for the acquisition.

item.title: Crypto Trader Turns $2,500 Into $500K on Skyrocketing Ethereum Meme Coin
item.description: A meme coin trader turned $2,500 into nearly $500,000 in a matter of hours via the Elon Musk-linked ASTEROID token on Ethereum.

item.title: Anthropic’s Alarming Mythos Findings Replicated With Off-the-Shelf AI, Researchers Say
item.description: Security researchers used GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 in an open-source harness to reproduce Anthropic's Mythos vulnerability findings for under $30 per scan.

item.title: Strategy Shares Pop as Bitcoin Holdings Flip Green, Near $61 Billion
item.description: The Bitcoin-buying firm’s stockpile had shown losses on paper since early February.

item.title: Sam Altman’s World project launches major upgrade to fight deepfakes and bots
item.description: The project is also expanding its partnerships with Tinder, Zoom and Docusign.

item.title: Price predictions 4/17: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK
item.description: Bitcoin pole vaulted to $78,000 and altcoins soared after Iran said that the Strait of Hormuz was fully open. Will bulls be able to sustain the upward momentum?

item.title: Singapore Gulf Bank adds stablecoin mint and redeem for 24/7 settlement
item.description: The Bahrain-based lender lets institutional clients convert fiat currency to US dollar-pegged stablecoins directly from their accounts.

item.title: French finance minister backs euro-pegged stablecoins to compete with US
item.description: The country's finance minister supported the Qivalis initiative, launched in 2025, to create a euro-pegged stablecoin under the MiCA framework.

item.title: US Government Moves Bitcoin Tied to $9 Billion Bitfinex Hack
item.description: The U.S. government moved 8.2 Bitcoin, or greater than $600,000, that is linked to the $9 billion Bitfinex hack from 2016.

item.title: Beaten-down digital asset treasury names lead crypto stock surge as bitcoin hits $78,000
item.description: Oil prices slumped as Trump said Iran committed to open the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. plans to acquire that country's enriched uranium as part of a deal.

item.title: Dogecoin Gold? A DOGE-Themed Company Is Joining the Tokenized Gold Rush
item.description: The company Dogecoin Cash plans to develop tokens representing physical gold, following the lead of firms like Tether and Paxos.

item.title: Don’t get AI agents and stablecoin transfers? Enroll in CoinDesk University
item.description: CoinDesk University’s School of Stablecoin and Agentic Commerce will give you the tools to move beyond understanding to action.

item.title: JUST IN: $400,000,000 worth of shorts liquidated from the crypto market in the past 4 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAxOThaQTYzMllnRHl4QWJHekFieWZFdUFHOTRVMENnNmVwNWtKVmQ0Y2pTeGp0ejNJSERsNkMyci1nbXpYWHo2M3VkWjhVb2V2TTY5VEZsUVJxN1ZTY2hKTE9R?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $400,000,000 worth of sho…

item.title: AI Agents Already Run a Fifth of DeFi, But Still Lose to Humans at Trading
item.description: A new report finds that agents have taken over the predictable corners of DeFi, but humans still clear the table when trades get complex.

item.title: Bitcoin, Stocks Surge as Iran Says Strait of Hormuz Is 'Completely Open'
item.description: Bitcoin spiked above $77,000 as stock indices set records, following word that Iran's Strait of Hormuz is open during the ceasefire.

item.title: Kraken Parent Payward Agrees to Acquire Derivatives Exchange Bitnomial for $550 Million
item.description: The acquisition will give Kraken access to complete CFTC-licensed crypto derivatives infrastructure in the U.S.

item.title: Bitcoin price quietly sets new 10-week high as trader sees $88K in weeks
item.description: Bitcoin price rallied above $77,000 amid cooling geopolitical tensions and record-high back-to-back closes for the S&P 500.

item.title: Neo co-founder proposes $461M treasury overhaul to end ‘trust me’ governance
item.description: Neo’s proposed overhaul would restructure its foundation, return tokens to the community and impose formal oversight, as co-founders clash over governance and control.

item.title: Crypto execs ramp up security as wrench attacks increase
item.description: Notable crypto execs descended on Paris Blockchain Week, bringing more attention to personal security as kidnapping and ransom attempts skyrocket.

item.title: Back in the black: Strategy surges 8% as bitcoin's rise to $77,000 puts holdings in profit
item.description: Bitcoin climbed above its 100-day moving average, while Strategy moves back above its 200-week trend level.

item.title: Bitcoin and Chill. - x.com
item.description: Bitcoin and Chill.

item.title: Bitcoin rises, oil falls after Iran says Strait of Hormuz is open
item.description: Bitcoin surged above $77,000 as oil futures fell 10% after Iran’s foreign minister declared the Strait of Hormuz open for the remainder of the ceasefire between the US, Israel and Iran.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) gains 1.5%, leading index higher
item.description: Hedera (HBAR) joined Stellar (XLM) as a top performer, rising 1.4% from Thursday.

item.title: Telegram CEO Durov warns EU age-verification app could enable wider tracking
item.description: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov cited claims the EU’s new age-check app was hacked in minutes, warning it could expand into wider online identity controls.

item.title: Bitcoin rises past $76,000, aiming at major breakout as oil plunges on Iran cooldown
item.description: Iran's foreign minister said the Strait of Hormuz will remain completely open for the remainder of the ceasefire.

item.title: Ramp Network rolls out multichain wallet for simpler self-custody
item.description: The crypto infrastructure company said its new wallet lets users buy, sell, swap and cash out digital assets in one app without relying on outside providers.

item.title: SEC Officials Push US Crypto Ambitions in Debut Podcast Episode
item.description: The agency's chairman, Paul Atkins, sat down with two key commissioners to outline a shift away from enforcement.

item.title: France's finance minister calls for more euro stablecoins in sign of government policy shift
item.description: The statements signal a potential shift in stance within the French government and its central bank.

item.title: Morning Minute: $11T+ Schwab Goes All In on Crypto
item.description: Schwab's offering spot BTC & ETH trading (with a hefty fee), while CFTC Chair Selig is getting hit from both sides of the political aisle.

item.title: Kraken's parent company Payward to acquire derivatives exchange Bitnomial for $550 million in cash and stock
item.description: The deal gives Payward control of a fully licensed U.S. crypto derivatives stack, accelerating its expansion in regulated markets.

item.title: Negative Funding Rates Hit Yearly High as Bitcoin Tests $76K
item.description: Bitcoin funding rates hit year-high negative levels, setting up a potential short squeeze—or bull trap—as its price tests $76K.

item.title: Flow Capital plans to tokenize $150M private credit fund via DigiFT: Report
item.description: Bloomberg reported Flow Capital plans to tokenize its private credit fund to raise additional capital, but crypto execs warn tokenization doesn’t magically make hard-to-trade assets liquid.

item.title: Tempo’s ‘Zones’ sparks debate over privacy in crypto infrastructure
item.description: Tempo’s new “Zones” feature offers private, permissioned stablecoin transactions on its layer-1 for enterprises, but critics warn the operator‑controlled design adds back centralized trust.

item.title: Bitcoin’s ceasefire boost is starting to fizzle out as investors look for real-world results
item.description: What you need to know for April 17, 2026

item.title: Circle Hit With Class Action Lawsuit Over $285M Drift Protocol Hack
item.description: Lawyers allege Circle failed to freeze stolen USDC during an eight-hour window as hackers moved funds from the exploited trading platform.

item.title: Bitcoin stalls below $76,000 as sell wall caps rally despite rising derivatives activity
item.description: The bitcoin price is hovering near a key resistance level with $450 million in sell orders overhead as liquidations surge and derivatives data signal caution.

item.title: Ethereum NFT platform Foundation shuts down after failed Blackdove sale
item.description: Foundation is shutting down after a failed sale to Blackdove, having processed about $230 million in NFT primary sales since its launch in 2021.

item.title: Tokenization doesn’t ‘magically’ fix illiquid assets: PBW 2026
item.description: Industry speakers at Paris Blockchain Week said tokenization can broaden access and issuance, but it does not by itself create active secondary markets for illiquid assets.

item.title: Bitcoin reset may be complete as onchain data points to cycle low
item.description: RHODL ratio suggests market conditions resemble cycle corrections rather than late-stage tops, as long-term holders regain dominance.

item.title: Russia-linked Grinex exchange halts operations after $13 million ‘state-backed’ hack
item.description: The exchange, formerly known as Garantex and based in Kyrgyzstan, has been sanctioned by the U.S., U.K. and EU for helping users bypass sanctions.

item.title: Ethereum just had its busiest quarter ever, capping a three-year comeback
item.description: Quarterly transactions hit 200.4 million in Q1 2026, the first time above 200 million and more than double the 2023 lows.

item.title: Every bitcoin bear market bottom since 2015 was called by a simple indicator. It still hasn't flashed
item.description: A bitcoin indicator based on key moving averages has accurately marked every bear market bottom since 2015. That signal hasn't fired yet.

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: Ethereum Foundation-funded project uncovers 100 North Korean IT workers who had infiltrated Web3 companies under fake identities. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1RZE9WMHZlWTQ1WHAzLU5QVDNQbDRRaDRMSHNGTzZiYmo0NnltdDRKMkVQdjlWVzM3QnNmbDFUelZ4MUpnbGt5SnBKdTVETnhMXzN1Rk93eFN1R2VaYm9tdTlXNm8?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: Ethereum Foundation-…

item.title: Arthur Hayes: 90% of My Net Worth Is Bitcoin On April 10, 2026, BitMEX Co-founder Arthur Hayes @CryptoHayes stated in Anthony Pompliano's interview that over 90% of his net worth is in Bitcoin. Given his low cost basis, he remains inactive amid market fluc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBFa2tkN0ZXU1pYYnctZUNVWFdSRS1EWTB1bUdyd2ZLQjVxT0QwbnNacm90NFFBS2dzOWJQQVl3alJlR1Ftcll4c1Q4SFowdFN3YnZISHVQMXZCTFRtOTJDMHlkRQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Arthur Hayes: 90% of My Net Wort…

item.title: Most Bitcoin $BTC traders are betting to the upside! This week, we watched BTC charge toward $75,300 to wipe out $80 million in shorts. Mission accomplished. Now that those shorts are cleared, the market is beginning to lean long as traders chase the rally. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5BMWMtMFpJUHlvWXZMQ19pcVdZMlhUVTZhSmVTZnpaWEQ2NmxPUTZCQXdmU0hyRU94V2dGUmZaQkhZanBxelMycV9NNjJrQjktRTJYTGRRWlNLVE53aE5N?oc=5" target="_blank">Most Bitcoin $BTC traders are betting …

item.title: The U.S. government moves $606,000 in bitcoin linked to the 2016 Bitfinex hack to Coinbase
item.description: Bitfinex plans to use the returned coins to redeem all Recovery Right Tokens and devote at least 80 percent of remaining net proceeds to repurchasing and burning its UNUS SED LEO token.
